description.value: Aura strong evocation; CL 13th; Slot ring; Price 15,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION Once per day, the wearer of this charred bone ring may, as an immediate action, cause it to detonate in a 30-foot-radius burst that deals 10d6 points of fire damage ( Reflex DC 14 half). If the wearer is killed by the detonation, all magical equipment he carries must also save or take fire damage, and all non-magical equipment takes this damage with no saving throw. This explosion never destroys the ring. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring, Quicken Spell, fireball; Cost 7,500 gp
